description: Crafted from genuine leather, this wallet from lee is a must-have accessory for the well-dressed male. lee has perfected this traditional accessory's foray into modern wardrobes by combining classic techniques and innovative designs. Carry your monetary essentials with ease in this classic wallet. Dimensions: 13 cm x 9.5 cm Two main compartments with embossed branding on the front Textured upper Two slip pockets for coins on the left side with a flap on top with two photo id slots on either side of the flap A buttoned pocket on the right side Contrasting leather overlay stitched to the spine of the wallet for style Care Rub surface with dry clean cloth to remove dust and dirt
